title: Pennsieve Application Manifest
description: Declarative manifest (app.json) committed to an application's source repository. Pennsieve reads this file when the repository is published to the App Store to seed the application's runtime configuration, parameters, inputs/outputs, and classification.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor autocomplete and validation.

description.description: Short description of what the application does.

applicationType.description: Role the application plays within a workflow.

categories.description: Curated categories used to group and discover applications.

tags.description: Free-form labels for search and filtering.

runtime.description: Where and how the application executes.

gpu.description: GPU requirements. Omit or set enabled=false for CPU-only applications.

resources.description: Default CPU and memory reservation. These are defaults; workspace runs may override within allowed limits.

parameters.description: Run-time parameters exposed to users. The default of each parameter pre-populates the workflow run form.

inputs.description: Typed input ports. Used to validate connections when the application is placed in a workflow.

outputs.description: Typed output ports. Used to validate connections to downstream applications.

name.description: Machine name passed to the application. Must be unique within the manifest.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the run form.

description.description: Help text shown beneath the field.

type.description: Parameter data type. Determines the control rendered in the UI.

required.description: Whether a value must be supplied before the run can start.

default.description: Default value used to pre-populate the run form. Must match the parameter type.

allowedValues.description: Permitted values. Required when type is "enum".

name.description: Port name. Must be unique among the application's inputs (or outputs).

dataType.description: Data type carried by the port. Used to validate workflow connections.

required.description: Whether the port must be connected for the application to run (inputs only).
